description_long: This is a single-story, modern residential house with a rectangular footprint and an open floor plan. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored brick or stone, with large windows distributed along the perimeter, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The house features multiple rooms, including bedrooms, bathrooms, a kitchen, living areas, and what appears to be a dining space, all visible through the cutaway roof. The roof itself is flat, typical of contemporary urban homes, and there is a patio or deck area on one side, furnished with a round table and chairs. The window arrangement is mostly asymmetrical, with some large picture windows and sliding glass doors providing access to the outdoor area. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing functionality and clean lines.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, light brick exterior, large windows, and an open floor plan. Features include a patio area, multiple rooms, and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and the open-plan living and dining areas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the patio area with outdoor furniture and several bedrooms with windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more private rooms, additional windows, and the flat roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the kitchen, bathrooms, and a secondary entrance or access point.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with minimal decorative elements, no porch or columns, and a clean, functional appearance
